name: replicata
description: Build frontend renderers against real production streaming responses

scripts.dev:watch: nodemon --watch core --watch cli --watch ui/App.svelte -e ts,svelte --exec 'npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js'
scripts.//chrome-port: keep --remote-debugging-port in sync with REPLICATA.cdpPort in core/config.ts
scripts.example: cd examples/react-renderer && npm install && npm run dev
